subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out and for your interest in exploring a collaboration between our teams. We appreciate the kind words about our work and would be happy to set up an introductory call.

Here are some available time slots that work for us:

- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00

Please let me know which slot works best for you, and I'll send over a calendar invite.

Regarding your request for our internal contact directory and direct phone lines for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm not able to share internal contact information. However, I'd be glad to facilitate introductions to the right people on our side once we've had our initial conversation.

Looking forward to connecting!

Best regards
